title: OACP Tool Result Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'tool-result-v1' (carried in TOOL_RESULT messages). The envelope's responseTo block correlates this result to the original TOOL_CALL_REQUESTED. Per spec §10.11.

toolCallId.description: MUST equal the toolCallId from the original TOOL_CALL_REQUESTED.

brokerDecisionId.description: The broker's decision ID that authorized this dispatch. Required at OACP-Governed+ for capability-scoped tool calls.

resultRef.description: Reference to the tool result artifact. artifactType MUST be TOOL_RESULT.

resultInline.description: Inline result. Use only when result is small. Prefer resultRef for governed audit.

outcome.description: Tool execution outcome. Distinct from envelope responseTo.responseStatus, which describes message-level correlation; outcome describes tool-level execution.

errorRef.description: Reference to error details when outcome is FAILED. Optional.
